data.name: Landlady Seduction Simulator
data.detailed_description:
房东诱惑模拟器 是一部引人入胜的视觉小说，探讨了一位年轻女性在情感创伤中的诱惑之旅。她发现与自己相恋七年的男友背叛了她，于是决定暂时放下生活，离开小镇以平复心情。为筹措出行费用，她将自己的公寓出租给了新房客。然而，原本简单的租赁安排很快演变成一段意想不到的禁忌之恋，考验着她的意志力。

行李打包妥当，旅行计划周密，唯一剩下的就是将钥匙交给新租客。然而，这看似简单的交接却迅速变成了一场复杂的欲望和诱惑纠缠。当她与租客互动时，曾经深埋的情感开始浮出水面，将她推向未知且危险的境地。她能否抵挡住内心深处的欲望，还是会屈服于两人之间愈发炽热的禁忌吸引力？

这款游戏将你带入一个充满情感冲突和热烈诱惑的世界，你做出的每个选择都可能改变最终结局。你是会引导房东走向新生活，还是让她陷入无法自拔的激情之中？

在房东诱惑模拟器中，这不仅仅是关于走出心碎的困境，而是如何重新点燃激情。你的目标是诱惑房东，将她带入一段她从未预料的感官之旅。通过精心设计的互动，调情的对话和大胆的举动，你将有机会让她心动——甚至把她带入你的床上。你能否赢得她的信任，打破她的情感屏障，揭示她隐藏的欲望？

准备好沉浸在欲望、情感波动和意外浪漫的故事中，你的每一个决定都可能带来难忘的联系，或错失的机会。

  • 紧张的故事情节：沉浸在充满欲望、诱惑和背叛的引人入胜的故事中。

  • 你的房东完全配有语音，生动展现她在每一幕中的情感和欲望。

  • 露骨的成人内容：游戏包含详细的性行为描写。

  • 精美细致的画面：欣赏高质量的视觉效果，精美的人物设计和细腻的环境细节。

  • 激情场景全程动画呈现，为每个亲密时刻增添沉浸感与刺激感。

  • 沉浸式原声带：享受精心制作的原声音乐，为每个场景营造氛围并增强体验。

  • 单手游戏模式：为您的舒适设计，让您可以全身心投入体验...并让一只手自由做其他事情。

data.short_description: 您的目标是通过精心挑选的互动、调情对话和大胆的举动来勾引房东，并把她带上床！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version 10.11+
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Landlady Seduction Simulator
data.detailed_description:
Landlady Seduction Simulator is a captivating visual novel that delves into the emotional and seductive journey of a young woman grappling with heartbreak. After discovering that her boyfriend of seven years has been unfaithful, she decides to take a break from her life, leaving town to clear her mind. To finance her escape, she rents out her apartment to a new tenant. But what begins as a simple arrangement quickly spirals into an unexpected and forbidden affair that will test her willpower.

With her bags packed and her trip meticulously planned, all that's left is handing over the keys to her new tenant. However, what she thought would be a straightforward exchange transforms into a complex web of temptation and desire. As she interacts with the tenant, emotions she thought were long buried start to resurface, pushing her into unfamiliar and dangerous territory. Will she resist the pull of her hidden passions, or will she give in to the illicit attraction growing between them?

This game plunges you into a world of emotional conflict and heated seduction, where every choice you make could alter the outcome. Will you guide the landlady toward a fresh start, or lead her down a path of steamy indulgence that redefines her life?

In Landlady Seduction Simulator, it's not just about surviving heartbreak—it's about turning the tables and reigniting passion. Your goal is to seduce the landlady and lead her into a sensual journey she never expected. Through carefully chosen interactions, flirty conversations, and bold advances, you’ll have the chance to sweep her off her feet—and into bed. Can you earn her trust and break down her emotional walls to reveal the desires she’s been hiding?

Prepare to immerse yourself in a tale of lust, emotional turmoil, and unexpected romance, where every move you make can either lead to an unforgettable connection or a missed opportunity.

  • Intense Storyline: Dive into a captivating tale of lust, temptation, and betrayal.

  • Your landlady is fully voice-acted, bringing her emotions and desires to life in every scene.

  • Explicit Adult Content: The game contains graphic depictions of sexual acts.

  • Beautiful, Detailed Art: Enjoy high-quality visuals with stunning character designs and richly detailed environments.

  • The steamy scenes are fully animated, adding an extra layer of immersion and excitement to every intimate moment.

  • Immersive Soundtrack: Enjoy a carefully curated soundtrack that sets the mood and enhances every scene.

  • One-Handed Play Mode: Designed for comfort, so you can fully immerse yourself in the experience… with one hand free for other activities.

data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
